method_catalog.description: Per-method JSON Schema hints for params (JSON-RPC params array) and result. Use boing_getRpcMethodCatalog / boing_getRpcOpenApi for machine-readable discovery.

methods.name: boing_health
methods.summary: Liveness, version, optional chain metadata, committed head height, RPC surface hints (batch/body/logs limits, WS cap, rate limit, ready peers), and cumulative rpc_metrics.

rpc_metrics.description: Monotonic counters since process start (best-effort diagnostics).

methods.name: boing_chainHeight
methods.summary: Latest committed block height (u64).

methods.name: boing_clientVersion
methods.summary: Node build id string.

methods.name: boing_getSyncState
methods.summary: Committed tip: head/finalized height and latest block hash.

methods.name: boing_getNetworkInfo
methods.summary: Chain metadata, tip, consensus, native aggregates, developer hints.

methods.name: boing_rpcSupportedMethods
methods.summary: Sorted list of implemented boing_* method names.

methods.name: boing_getRpcMethodCatalog
methods.summary: Embedded JSON Schema method catalog for codegen and docs.

methods.name: boing_getRpcOpenApi
methods.summary: Minimal OpenAPI 3.1 document for POST / JSON-RPC, GET /ws, GET /live, GET /ready.

methods.name: boing_getBalance
methods.summary: Native balance for 32-byte account id (hex).

methods.name: boing_getAccount
methods.summary: Account balance, nonce, stake (u128 as decimal strings).

methods.name: boing_getBlockByHeight
methods.summary: Block at height; null if missing. Second arg requests receipts.

methods.name: boing_getBlockByHash
methods.summary: Block by 32-byte header hash hex.

methods.name: boing_getTransactionReceipt
methods.summary: Receipt by tx id hex; null if unknown.

methods.name: boing_getLogs
methods.summary: Event logs with block range and optional address/topics filters.

methods.name: boing_simulateContractCall
methods.summary: Dry-run a contract call without a signed transaction (contract hex, calldata hex, optional sender hex, optional at_block).

prefixItems.description: optional sender AccountId hex; omit or null for zero sender
optional at_block: "latest", null, or current tip height (integer)

methods.name: boing_simulateTransaction
methods.summary: Dry-run execution; returns gas, logs, state diffs.

methods.name: boing_submitTransaction
methods.summary: Submit signed transaction (hex).

methods.name: boing_submitIntent
methods.summary: Submit signed intent.

methods.name: boing_faucetRequest
methods.summary: Testnet faucet (when enabled).

methods.name: boing_getAccountProof
methods.summary: State Merkle proof for an account.

methods.name: boing_verifyAccountProof
methods.summary: Verify an account proof.

methods.name: boing_getContractStorage
methods.summary: Single 32-byte storage slot for a contract.

methods.name: boing_getDexToken
methods.summary: Single token row from the DEX-derived discovery universe. Factory: params.factory or BOING_CANONICAL_NATIVE_DEX_FACTORY. Optional light / enrich; includeDiagnostics for scan counters; BOING_DEX_TOKEN_DECIMALS_JSON overrides decimals.

result.description: Token object or JSON null when unknown

methods.name: boing_listDexPools
methods.summary: Cursor-paginated native DEX pools (directory + live reserves). Each row includes tokenADecimals/tokenBDecimals from BOING_DEX_TOKEN_DECIMALS_JSON (default 18). Factory: params.factory or env. Receipt-backed createdAtHeight unless light=true; BOING_DEX_DISCOVERY_MAX_RECEIPT_SCANS; includeDiagnostics.

methods.name: boing_listDexTokens
methods.summary: DEX-derived token set with optional minReserveProduct / minLiquidityWei. Enriches from receipts + recent metadata deploys unless light=true. Factory: params.factory or env. includeDiagnostics; BOING_DEX_TOKEN_DECIMALS_JSON.

methods.name: boing_qaCheck
methods.summary: Run QA checks on contract bytecode/metadata.

methods.name: boing_getQaRegistry
methods.summary: Serialized QA rule registry.

methods.name: boing_qaPoolList
methods.summary: Pending QA pool items.

methods.name: boing_qaPoolConfig
methods.summary: QA pool governance config.

methods.name: boing_qaPoolVote
methods.summary: Vote on a QA pool item (operator auth may apply).

methods.name: boing_operatorApplyQaPolicy
methods.summary: Replace QA registry and pool config (operator token).

methods.name: boing_registerDappMetrics
methods.summary: Register dApp metrics endpoint.

info.title: Boing Node HTTP + WebSocket
info.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP POST /. Push notifications: WebSocket GET /ws with subscribe handshake (see boing_getNetworkInfo.developer.websocket).

servers.description: Example; set host and port per node.

get.description: Returns **405** with **`Allow: GET, HEAD, POST, OPTIONS`** and a short plain-text hint (for `curl` without `-X POST` and browser visits).

405.description: Use **POST /** with JSON-RPC body. Response is plain text; header **Allow** lists methods.

options.description: Handler returns **204** with **`Allow: GET, HEAD, POST, OPTIONS`**. The **CORS** middleware may answer **OPTIONS** first with **200** (preflight); both include allowed methods.

200.description: CORS preflight response (may be empty body).

204.description: Direct **OPTIONS** when CORS passes through; **Allow** lists methods.

post.description: Body is either one **JsonRpcRequest** object or a **JSON array** of objects (batch). Batch responses are a JSON array of **JsonRpcResponse** in the same order (entries without `id` are notifications and omitted). Max batch length: **BOING_RPC_MAX_BATCH** (default 32, cap 256). One HTTP POST consumes **one** global rate-limit token when rate limiting is enabled.

200.description: Single JSON-RPC response **or** JSON array of responses (batch). Inspect `error` when present.

204.description: No JSON body: single notification, or batch where **every** request is a notification (JSON-RPC 2.0).

413.description: JSON body larger than **BOING_RPC_MAX_BODY_MB** (default 8 MiB). Response is **application/json** with **`code: payload_too_large`**, **`message`**, and **`request_id`** when known.

429.description: HTTP 429 when global JSON-RPC rate limit applies. Body includes JSON-RPC error **-32016** and optional **`boing_http`** object (**`code: rate_limited`**, **`message`**, **`request_id`**). Header **Retry-After: 1** (seconds) hints backoff. Responses include **x-request-id** (echoed from request or generated).

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Optional correlation id; echoed on the response when present, otherwise a UUID is assigned.

get.description: After upgrade: send one text frame `{"type":"subscribe","channel":"newHeads"}`; server replies `subscribed` then streams `newHead` JSON objects on each committed block. Optional cap: **BOING_RPC_WS_MAX_CONNECTIONS** (0 = unlimited); when exceeded, handshake returns **503**.

get.summary: Machine-readable RPC discovery (paths to OpenAPI, probes, JSON-RPC)

200.description: JSON object with **schema_version** and path hints

get.description: Default **text/plain** `ok\n`. With **`Accept: application/json`** or **`GET /live.json`**, returns **`{ "ok": true }`**.

Acquires state read lock. If **BOING_RPC_READY_MIN_PEERS** is set (>0), also requires at least that many P2P peers. JSON mode: **Accept: application/json** or **GET /ready.json**; **503** includes **Retry-After: 5** (seconds).

503.description: Peer count below **BOING_RPC_READY_MIN_PEERS** (when configured); JSON body explains **reason**

DexDiscoveryParams.description: Params object for boing_listDexPools / boing_listDexTokens / boing_getDexToken (single-element JSON-RPC params array).

light.description: When true, skip receipt + deploy scans (heights null; token metadataSource abbrev-only).

enrich.description: When false, same as light: true.

includeDiagnostics.description: When true, include diagnostics counters on the result.

minReserveProduct.description: listDexTokens only: decimal digit string u128 filter.

minLiquidityWei.description: listDexTokens only: decimal digit string u128 per-leg minimum.

id.description: getDexToken only: 32-byte token account id hex.
Omitted for notifications (no HTTP JSON body for single notification).

boing_http.description: Optional HTTP-level envelope (e.g. **429** rate limit correlation).
